reasoning: Solana's all-time high is approximately $293, reached in January 2025. Throughout April 2025, SOL has been trading far below this level, mostly in the $110 to $135 range (specifically, around $134.60 on April 17). The Polymarket odds for this event were already 0.00 on April 17, underscoring the absolute consensus that $300 was not reached earlier in the month and is extremely unlikely to be reached. With only 3 days left in April (until April 30), SOL would need to surge by over 120% to hit $300. Given the lack of any major positive catalysts and its recent bearish or sideways trend, reaching a new all-time high is effectively impossible outside of anomalous unrecorded exchange glitches. Therefore, the probability of hitting $300 on a Binance 1m candle in April is at the minimum allowed bound (0.02).
